input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A female warrior in yellow and green armor wields a blue double-bladed lightsaber, lunging forward on the left. Opposite her, a bald, pale-skinned figure in dark armor extends a hand emitting blue force lightning while holding a red lightsaber. In the misty forest background, numerous soldiers engage in combat with blaster fire and additional lightsabers visible amidst the trees.</think><answer></answer>

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-6] In a misty forest, a female warrior in yellow-green armor lunges with a blue double-bladed lightsaber against a pale, bald figure in dark armor projecting blue force lightning and holding a red lightsaber, while background soldiers fight. [6-8] The scene cross-fades to a dark, fiery interior as a central figure in a black hood and metallic mask with glowing red eyes appears, replacing the forest combatants. [8-12] The masked figure stands amidst smoke and burning debris while ghostly, semi-transparent images of combatants fade in behind, including silhouettes wielding green and blue lightsabers on the left and right. [12-16] Inside a large hall with columns, a blue-skinned female with head-tails in a dark bodysuit stands left, facing a central figure in a black hooded cloak seen from behind. To the right, a man in green armor and a robed figure stand near pillars, while green lightsabers glow in the background left. [16-22] The scene cross-fades to a close-up combat encounter where a bald, pale figure with facial scarring and dark armor featuring red mechanical arm components faces right. He locks weapons with a male figure in brown robes, partially visible in profile. A vertical red lightsaber blade and an angled

[38-44] A bald, pale figure in dark armor extends a mechanical arm weapon while a blue-skinned female crouches nearby; background combatants clash with red and blue lightsabers in a columned hall as a semi-transparent mechanical overlay fades in. [44-50] The perspective shifts behind the bald figure, revealing cracked skin, as he faces a robed figure standing on a high balcony in a bright hall with tall columns. [50-52] The scene cross-fades to a duel in a debris-filled ruin where the bald figure wields a red lightsaber against a crouching opponent with a green blade.

[52-54] In a rubble-strewn ruin, a bald figure in dark armor holds a horizontal red lightsaber opposite a crouching robed figure wielding a green blade. [54-60] Horizontal scan lines overlay a chaotic battle where a central figure in orange robes brandishes a red lightsaber, while blue and red blades clash in the background behind large, dark foreground shapes. [60-66] The scene clears to show a bald, pale figure in heavy black armor with a breathing mask and chest panel standing motionless against a snowy landscape with distant mechanical walkers, his black cape flowing slightly.

[66-70] In a ruined interior, a bald figure in dark armor with red chest lights kneels amidst debris, head bowed, gripping a vertical red lightsaber with mechanical hands.
[70-76] A semi-transparent overlay of a pale, masked face with glowing red accents appears with the text "STAR WARS" in the bottom left. The scene resolves to a static close-up of this masked character holding a lightsaber hilt upright against a dark, smoky background.
[76-80] The view cross-fades into a misty forest duel where the bald armored figure thrusts a red lightsaber, clashing with a female figure in tan clothing wielding a staff weapon emitting a blue blade. The "STAR WARS" text disappears.

[80-82] In a misty forest, a bald figure clad in dark armor thrusts a red lightsaber against a female figure in tan clothing, who defends using a staff weapon emitting a blue blade from its base, their weapons locked in static combat. [82-86] The duel cross-fades into a ruined interior hall with tall columns, where a pale, bald figure wearing a black breathing mask with glowing red accents extends a mechanical right arm to project continuous, arcing blue lightning from his fingertips without significant movement. [86-88] A semi-transparent overlay of a face with intense eyes and a mask dominates the foreground over the lightning scene. [88-92] The overlay vanishes to reveal a clear close-up of the pale figure's unmasked face, featuring glowing yellow eyes and dark, vein-like scarring on his left cheek; he wears dark armor with a small red collar light and stares fixedly forward against a blurred, greyish forest backdrop, his expression remaining unmoving.

recent_thinks: [92-94] The pale, bald figure with glowing yellow eyes and dark facial scarring remains in a static close-up shot. He wears dark armor with a small red light on the collar, staring intensely forward against a blurred forest background. His expression and position are unchanged, maintaining a fixed gaze without visible movement or environmental shifts.

[94-96] The unmasked facial close-up fades out as a vertical artwork appears centrally. This static illustration depicts the masked, pale character in dark armor holding a glowing red lightsaber diagonally across the chest against a teal background. Black bars frame the artwork's sides. A brief superimposition of the face occurs over the art during the transition.

[96-98] The static vertical artwork persists, showing the masked, pale character in dark armor gripping a red lightsaber diagonally across the chest. The teal, atmospheric background remains unchanged behind the figure. Black bars continue to frame the left and right sides of the image. No motion or visual alterations occur within this timeframe.

[98-100] The static vertical artwork persists, depicting the masked, pale figure in dark armor holding a glowing red lightsaber diagonally across the chest. The teal, atmospheric background remains unchanged behind the character. Black bars continue to frame the left and right sides of the image, with no motion or visual alterations occurring within this timeframe.

[100-102] The vertical artwork transitions to a new static illustration featuring a full-body view of a figure in heavy black armor with red glowing accents on the mask and gauntlets. The character stands against a dark, smoky grey background, holding a red lightsaber hilt downwards in their right hand, while black bars continue to frame the sides.

queries.question: Are the red and green lightsaber blades clashing against each other yet?

samples.output: <think>The static full-body illustration remains unchanged, depicting a figure in heavy black armor with red glowing accents on the mask and gauntlets. The character stands motionless against a dark, smoky grey background, holding a red lightsaber hilt downwards in the right hand. Black bars continue to frame the left and right sides of the image without alteration.</think><answer></answer>

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: [0-6] In a misty forest, a female warrior in yellow-green armor lunges with a blue double-bladed lightsaber against a pale, bald figure in dark armor projecting blue force lightning and holding a red lightsaber, while background soldiers fight. [6-8] The scene cross-fades to a dark, fiery interior as a central figure in a black hood and metallic mask with glowing red eyes appears, replacing the forest combatants. [8-12] The masked figure stands amidst smoke and burning debris while ghostly, semi-transparent images of combatants fade in behind, including silhouettes wielding green and blue lightsabers on the left and right.

[12-16] Inside a large hall with columns, a blue-skinned female with head-tails in a dark bodysuit stands left, facing a central figure in a black hooded cloak seen from behind. To the right, a man in green armor and a robed figure stand near pillars, while green lightsabers glow in the background left. [16-22] The scene cross-fades to a close-up combat encounter where a bald, pale figure with facial scarring and dark armor featuring red mechanical arm components faces right. He locks weapons with a male figure in brown robes, partially visible in profile. A vertical red lightsaber blade and an angled green blade intersect near bulky gauntlets in a dark, stone interior. [22-26] The view clears to a grand hall lined with tall columns and statues. The figure in the black cloak and the blue-skinned female walk away from the camera down the central path, moving steadily toward the background structures as light streams from the left, casting long shadows.

recent_thinks: [26-28] The cloaked figure and blue-skinned female continue walking away. A cross-fade superimposes a large, armored figure over the scene. This new figure wears dark armor with a metallic chest plate featuring circular details and glowing orange lights, plus a mask with red accents. Faint red lightsaber blades appear in the background of the overlay as the walking figures fade.

[28-30] The transition completes, leaving a central figure in dark, hooded armor with a metallic mask featuring red lights and a chest plate with circular details. The previous walking figures vanish entirely. Behind the armored entity, vertical red lightsaber blades glow amidst a dark, smoky red background, illuminating the scene.

[30-32] The central figure in dark, hooded armor with a metallic mask and chest plate remains stationary, facing forward. Glowing orange lights on the chest and red accents on the mask persist. The background stays dark and smoky with a red hue, while vertical red lightsaber blades continue to glow steadily behind the armored entity.

[32-34] A cross-fade reveals a large, circular metallic structure resembling a vault door in the background. A semi-transparent, oversized close-up of a masked face with glowing orange eyes overlays the left side. The central armored figure stands before the mechanical structure as the red lighting shifts to a darker, grey tone.

[34-36] The central armored figure stands motionless before the large circular metallic structure. The semi-transparent, oversized masked face with glowing orange eyes remains fixed on the left side. The environment maintains a dark, grey tone with consistent lighting on the figure's chest plate and mask.

input.user_input: Which text watermark is visible on the left side of the screen during the solo figure shots (132-138s)? A. STAR B. WARS C. COPYRIGHT KAMIL

samples.output: <think>The central hooded figure stands still in dark armor with a metallic mask. The semi-transparent face overlay remains fixed on the left. To the right, the edge of the frame reveals a vertical stone structure with a small cyan light, slightly expanding the view of the dark, industrial background while the lighting remains consistent.</think><answer>C</answer>

compressed_segments.text: [0-6] In a misty forest, a female warrior in yellow-green armor lunges with a blue double-bladed lightsaber against a pale, bald figure in dark armor projecting blue force lightning and holding a red lightsaber, while background soldiers fight. [6-8] The scene cross-fades to a dark, fiery interior as a central figure in a black hood and metallic mask with glowing red eyes appears, replacing the forest combatants. [8-12] The masked figure stands amidst smoke and burning debris while ghostly, semi-transparent images of combatants fade in behind, including silhouettes wielding green and blue lightsabers on the left and right.

[12-16] Inside a large hall with columns, a blue-skinned female with head-tails in a dark bodysuit stands left, facing a central figure in a black hooded cloak seen from behind. To the right, a man in green armor and a robed figure stand near pillars, while green lightsabers glow in the background left. [16-22] The scene cross-fades to a close-up combat encounter where a bald, pale figure with facial scarring and dark armor featuring red mechanical arm components faces right. He locks weapons with a male figure in brown robes, partially visible in profile. A vertical red lightsaber blade and an angled green blade intersect near bulky gauntlets in a dark, stone interior. [22-26] The view clears to a grand hall lined with tall columns and statues. The figure in the black cloak and the blue-skinned female walk away from the camera down the central path, moving steadily toward the background structures as light streams from the left, casting long shadows.

[26-30] A cloaked figure and blue-skinned female walk away while a cross-fade superimposes a large armored entity wearing dark armor, a metallic chest plate with circular details and glowing orange lights, and a mask with red accents. Faint red lightsaber blades appear in the background as the walking figures fade completely. [30-34] The central armored figure remains stationary, facing forward with glowing orange chest lights and red mask accents. The background is dark and smoky with a red hue, featuring vertical red lightsaber blades glowing steadily behind the entity. [34-38] The scene cross-fades to reveal a large circular metallic structure resembling a vault door. A semi-transparent, oversized close-up of a masked face with glowing orange eyes overlays the left side. The central figure stands before the mechanical structure as lighting shifts to a dark grey tone, revealing a vertical stone structure with a small cyan light on the right edge.
